description: Commercial accounts, perhaps 16th-century based on the paleography and names listed. Some of the entries are crossed out. The names listed include: (recto) Shelomo ʿUraybī, Yiṣḥaq Medina, Shemuʾel Kohen, and Yosef לוחייזה[?]. For another instance of this difficult surname compare to T-S NS 83.7 (PGPID 26200) "wife of Moshe לוחייזא?"– this may be a Sephardi name that is not clearly spelled (alternative readings include Lusieza, Lusiza). Verso names: Badr al-Dīn, Yiṣḥaq Ḥabīb, abd Abū Jāmʿī. These latter names may also also appear in T-S NS 83.7 referencing the same individuals. There are also some commodities listed, such as "bovine leather" and "iron." MCD.
tags: account, iron, Late JA, 16th c, leather
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
